violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface * was not cleaned adequately. - Fan covers in the walk in cooler have dust accumulated on them.

Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item * was not properly protected from potential contamination. - Pizza sauce is considered commercially sterile and is stored at room temperature hermetically sealed. However, once the sauce is opened, it continues to sit at room temperature exposed to air and the environment. Lids are not used to keep the sauce covered when not actively being used. There is no manufacturer information printed on the primary shipping container or on the packaging to address proper storage after opening.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil * was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. - Scoop in the cornmeal was not stored to keep the handle out of the cornmeal
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
